title: fadogia leucophloea var. djalonensis
intro: Fadogia leucophloea var. djalonensis is a plant species found in West Africa, particularly in the savannas and grasslands of Guinea, Sierra Leone, and Liberia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to increase testosterone levels and improve fertility in males. The health benefits associated with Fadogia leucophloea var. djalonensis include improved physical performance, enhanced muscle mass, and increased libido. Herbal preparations of the plant, often in the form of extracts or capsules, are available in some regions, although its commercial availability and regulation vary worldwide.
